output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's How to Fight Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a professional demand letter in 60 seconds for only $19.99.
content_outline: Why Landlords Withhold Security Deposits (And Why They're Often Wrong)
Know Your Rights: State Deadlines and Legal Requirements
What Landlords Can and Cannot Deduct From Your Deposit
How to Write a Security Deposit Demand Letter That Gets Results
The 60-Second Solution: No Lawyer, No Signup, No Subscription
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14 to 30 days
Normal wear and tear, minor scuffs, and faded paint are not legally deductible
A professionally written demand letter shows you know your rights and forces action
Deposits-Back.com generates state-specific demand letters in 60 seconds for $19.99 with zero signup or subscription
output.cta: Don't let your landlord keep what's yours. Generate your security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds at Deposits-Back.com for just $19.99—no signup, no subscription required.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters dealing with landlords who are withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting from their security deposits
